title: Knowledge Graph Lakehouse: a cloud-native data lakehouse for contextualised knowledge graphs
description: The Knowledge Graph Lakehouse is a cloud-native data lakehouse for contextualised knowledge graphs (CKGs), applied to Aeronautical Information Management. Clients upload raw aeronautical files (AIXM, IWXXM, FIXM); the system extracts multidimensional context hierarchies (time, location, topic) into an index and reconstructs contextualised knowledge graphs on demand (the KG-OLAP cube) per context, returning the result as RDF, a labeled property graph, or a Spark GraphFrame.
